titleStmt.title: SII 34.385: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 385. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: Gift of land, after purchase, for a lamp in the temple by Aḻagiya-maṇavāḷapperumāḷ praying for the health of his father Udaiyār alias Veḷḷōṭṭu-kaṇḍa-kāṅgēyaṉ, a kaikkōḷa-mudali of Tiruppaṉaṅgaḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacEkara tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 vatu taim māta
ttu Oru nāḷ cōḻamaṇṭalattu tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭuk kaikkōḷa mutalikaḷil Uṭaiyārāṉa veḷḷōṭ
ṭuk kaṇṭakāṅkēyaṉēṉ Eṉakku naṉṟāka vaṭakōṉāṭṭuk kūḻai kuḷattūruṭaiyār cuntara cōḷiśvaramu
ṭaiya nāyaṉārku cantirātityavaṟai tirunantāviḷakku Erikka nāṉ Ivvūrārum tāṉattārum pakkal vilai
koṇṭa peruñcaiyūr vayakkalāṉa kāṅkēyaṉ vayakkalum vampaṉ paṟikālu maṟikālum
tēvaṟku nāṟpatāvatu taimātam veḷḷōṭṭuk kaṇṭakāṅkayar makaṉ Aḻakiya
maṇavāḷapperumāḷēṉ Ivūr kulōttuṅ cōḻavēḷār Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal vilai
koṇṭuṭaiya cēntaṉ vayakkal Innāyaṉārku Oru tirinuntāviḷakku cantira Ātittavarai Erikka
Iṟaiyiliyāka tiruccūlastāpaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttēṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa perumāḷēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.385 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
